SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDO, ELIZABETH BARRIENTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED JUN-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDO, ELIZABETH BARRIENTOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELIZABETH BARRIENTOS UBALDO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UBALDO, ELIZABETH BARRIENTOS $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
